function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_02_19__eur_000600__inv_0009__helios_discovery_invoice.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_19__eur_000610__inv_0008__helios_backfill_rollout_week.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_21__eur_000760__inv_0007__helios_backfill_process_pack.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_19__eur_000520__inv_0006__helios_backfill_intake_audit.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write appears accepted; checklist status: attachments were all previously read and ordered newest-first among requested oldest 4; recipient miles@novak.example matches canonical miles entity; subject colon safely quoted. Next perform required inbox cleanup.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with no tool error returned.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: processed next inbox message, created reply draft with requested invoices, deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md after completing requested action.

function.message: Handled the next inbox item by preparing an outbound reply draft to Miles with the oldest 4 invoices linked to Claudia Reiter attached, then removed the processed inbox message.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used inbox email frontmatter as canonical sender metadata, verified sender against canonical entity primary_contact_email, read source invoice files before forwarding, wrote one outbox record with YAML-safe quoted subject, ordered attachments newest-first per mandatory rule, and deleted processed inbox item.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md asked for the oldest 4 Claudia-linked invoices. Preflight and invoice filenames identified the oldest four as INV-0006, INV-0007, INV-0008, and INV-0009; each was read directly. Sender miles@novak.example matched canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/miles.md, so request authority was valid. Outbound draft was created in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md with those four files attached (newest-first ordering as required by policy), then inbox item was deleted per workflow.
